# MuleSoft Government Cloud

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version of Government Cloud documentation.
> See [Government Cloud llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/gov-cloud/llms-full.txt) for all the Government Cloud documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Set up Your Government Cloud Account](https://docs.mulesoft.com/gov-cloud/gov-cloud-account-setup.md)
- [Anypoint VPN Configuration](https://docs.mulesoft.com/gov-cloud/gov-cloud-anypoint-vpn.md)
- [Dedicated Load Balancer Configuration](https://docs.mulesoft.com/gov-cloud/gov-cloud-load-balancer.md)
- [Secure Configuration for FedRAMP (Rev 5)](https://docs.mulesoft.com/gov-cloud/gov-cloud-secure-configuration-fedramp.md)
- [Security in MuleSoft Government Cloud](https://docs.mulesoft.com/gov-cloud/gov-cloud-security.md)
- [Standalone Mule Support in MuleSoft Government Cloud](https://docs.mulesoft.com/gov-cloud/gov-cloud-standalone.md)
- [Government Cloud Overview](https://docs.mulesoft.com/gov-cloud/index.md)
- [MuleSoft Government Cloud Release Notes](https://docs.mulesoft.com/gov-cloud/release-notes.md)
